│ cell        │ bounded rounded grid    │ own table frame with  │ aligned even when a cell is  │
 │ wrapping    │ that keeps the border   │ column separators     │ far longer than its header   │
 │             │ intact                  │                       │                              │
 ├─────────────┼─────────────────────────┼───────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────┤
 │ Terminal    │ Inherits the terminal   │ Inherits the terminal │ This is the row that proves  │
 │ background  │ background instead of   │ background instead of │ background parity across the │
 │ inheritance │ painting its own        │ painting its own      │ two clients                  │
 ├─────────────┼─────────────────────────┼───────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────┤
 │ Fenced code │ Preserves indentation   │ Preserves indentation │ Long lines should be handled │
 │ block       │ and monospace alignment │ and monospace         │ the same way by both         │
 │ styling     │ for every line          │ alignment for every   │ renderers                    │
 │             │                         │ line                  │                              │
 ╰─────────────┴─────────────────────────┴───────────────────────┴──────────────────────────────╯

     export const renderReference = (input: ReferenceInput): Effect.Effect<Rendered, RenderError>
      =>
       Effect.gen(function* () {
         const width = yield* Terminal.currentWidth
         const wrapped = wrapParagraph(input.paragraph, width)                                     █
         const table = layoutTable(input.rows, { border: "rounded", inheritBackground: true })     █
         return { headings: input.headings, paragraph: wrapped, table }                            █
       })                                                                                          █
                                                                                                   █
 The closing paragraph adds one more long wrapping line so the reviewer can compare the blank-row  █
 rhythm between the code block above and this final block of prose in both clients.                █
╭───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── $0.00 ─ medium ─╮
